title: Event Captain
summary: A Person who is fielding one of their boats at one Event. The captain owns the `SailingEvent` row for that (event, boat) pair and is the primary authority for the boat's per-race plan and crew roster.

source.predicate: SailingEvent.boat_uuid = B AND BoatCrew(boat_uuid=B, person_uuid=P, role='owner', status='active') exists
